Routines for obtaining the class names
of an object and its parent classes.
unique_everseenc
    return a tuple of all base classes the class c has as a parent.
    >>> object in all_bases(list)
    True
    
;/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/jaraco/classes/ancestry.py
	all_bases	
    return a tuple of all classes to which c belongs
    >>> list in all_classes(list)
    True
    r
all_classes
    Generator over all subclasses of a given class, in depth-first order.
    >>> bool in list(iter_subclasses(int))
    True
    >>> class A(object): pass
    >>> class B(A): pass
    >>> class C(A): pass
    >>> class D(B,C): pass
    >>> class E(D): pass
    >>>
    >>> for cls in iter_subclasses(A):
    ...     print(cls.__name__)
    B
    D
    E
    C
    >>> # get ALL classes currently defined
    >>> res = [cls.__name__ for cls in iter_subclasses(object)]
    >>> 'type' in res
    True
    >>> 'tuple' in res
    True
    >>> len(res) > 100
    True
    )
_iter_all_subclasses)
clsr
iter_subclasses
__subclasses__
	TypeErrorr
subs
subr
__doc__Z
more_itertoolsr
<module>
